attributes._cssText: body { margin: 0px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; background: rgb(245, 247, 251); color: rgb(31, 41, 55); }.top-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 18px; padding: 16px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(216, 222, 232); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); }.top-nav nav, .grid-actions, .plans { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; }.top-nav a, .grid-actions a, .plans a, button { min-height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(185, 194, 207); border-radius: 6px; padding: 0px 12px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgb(17, 24, 39); color: white; cursor: pointer; font: inherit; text-decoration: none; }.top-nav a { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(17, 24, 39); }.shell { min-height: calc(-73px + 100vh); display: grid; place-items: center; padding: 32px; }.panel { width: min(760px, 100%); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(216, 222, 232); border-radius: 8px; padding: 28px; }.eyebrow { margin: 0px 0px 8px; color: rgb(21, 94, 117); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; }h1 { margin: 0px 0px 12px; font-size: 32px; }h2 { margin: 0px 0px 8px; font-size: 18px; }form, .status-grid { display: grid; gap: 14px; margin-top: 24px; }label { display: grid; gap: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; }input, select, textarea { border: 1px solid rgb(185, 194, 200); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 12px; font: inherit; }.grid-actions { margin-top: 18px; }.status-grid, .plans { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0px, 1fr)); }.status-grid { display: grid; }.status-grid div, .plans article { border: 1px solid rgb(216, 222, 232); border-radius: 6px; padding: 14px; }dt { color: rgb(100, 116, 139); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; }dd { margin: 4px 0px 0px; font-weight: 700; }.plans { margin-top: 22px; }.check-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }.s-7IPF32Wcq3s8 { }
